rules.name: race_objective
rules.statement: Crocoburio must reach the Dofus before Grougalorasalar.

rules.name: no_normal_movement_points
rules.statement: The controlled avatar moves through special spells rather than normal PM.

rules.name: four_movement_spells
rules.statement: Indécision, Reflet, Rejet and Attrait are the movement actions.

rules.name: pillars_change_each_turn
rules.statement: Pillar layout is regenerated or changed each turn.

rules.name: glyph_pattern_changes_each_turn
rules.statement: The central black/white pattern changes each turn.

rules.name: relative_glyph_projection
rules.statement: The central pattern is projected as offsets around the final player cell.

rules.name: black_pillar_adverse
rules.statement: Any projected black glyph colliding with a pillar advances Grougalorasalar.

rules.name: black_priority
rules.statement: If black and white projected glyphs both hit pillars, only Grougalorasalar advances.

rules.name: white_matching_recharge
rules.statement: A projected white glyph on a pillar recharges the spell represented by that pillar.

rules.name: indecision_contact_teleport
rules.statement: Indécision teleports to a contact target cell.

rules.name: reflection_range_two
rules.statement: Reflet targets a pillar at exact range 2.

rules.name: reflection_formula
rules.statement: Reflet teleports to the cell symmetric to the source across the targeted pillar.

rules.name: repulsion_range
rules.statement: Rejet targets a pillar at range 1 to 2.

rules.name: repulsion_distance
rules.statement: Rejet moves the player three cells away on a cardinal cast and two diagonal cells away on a diagonal cast.

rules.name: attraction_range
rules.statement: Attrait targets a pillar at range 1 to 6.

rules.name: attraction_distance
rules.statement: Attrait moves the player three cells toward the targeted pillar.

rules.name: attraction_cardinal_alignment
rules.statement: Attrait permits only cardinally aligned pillar targets; diagonal targets are illegal.

rules.name: stationary_uses_projected_resolution
rules.statement: The final player position, including an unchanged position, is resolved by relative pattern projection.

rules.name: no_collision_croco_advance
rules.statement: If neither black nor white projected glyph touches a pillar, Crocoburio advances.

rules.name: center_black_adverse
rules.statement: Finishing on the physical central black glyph advances Grougalorasalar.

rules.name: center_white_recharge
rules.statement: Finishing on the physical central white glyph recharges spells by one.

rules.name: dragon_track_length
rules.statement: Grougalorasalar reaches the Dofus after eight adverse advances.

rules.name: croco_track_length_14
rules.statement: DofusPourLesNoobs states Crocoburio needs 14 advances.

rules.name: spells_can_become_unavailable
rules.statement: Gauge depletion can make a spell unavailable.

rules.name: cost_per_cast
rules.statement: Every spell cast costs exactly one AP.

rules.name: turn_action_budget
rules.statement: Every player turn has exactly 12 AP.

rules.name: multiple_casts_per_turn
rules.statement: The turn may contain multiple movement casts.

rules.name: numeric_charge_bounds
rules.statement: Every spell starts with 2 charges and is capped at 4.

rules.name: recharge_per_white_pillar
rules.statement: One matching white-pillar hit restores exactly one charge.

rules.name: multiple_white_hits_stack
rules.statement: Multiple matching white hits stack, capped at four charges.

rules.name: recharge_timing
rules.statement: Cast costs apply immediately; matching recharge applies during end-of-turn resolution.

rules.name: movement_path_blocking
rules.statement: Rejet is illegal when any traversed cell or its destination contains a pillar or obstacle; it never truncates before a blocker.

rules.name: occupied_destination
rules.statement: Every spell destination must be free.

rules.name: edge_truncation
rules.statement: Rejet is illegal when its movement path reaches the arena edge; it never truncates to a shorter movement.

rules.name: solo_only_product_scope
rules.statement: The solver supports solo screenshots only and rejects multiplayer input.

rules.name: four_visible_gauges
rules.statement: The supplied spell bar shows Indécision and Reflet unavailable at 0, with Rejet and Attrait available.

rules.name: runner_identity
rules.statement: The lower-left runner is Crocoburio and is not the controlled main-board avatar.

rules.name: indecision_contact_metric
rules.statement: Indécision targets exactly one of the four orthogonally adjacent cells; diagonals are illegal.

rules.name: reflection_range_metric
rules.statement: Reflet targets exactly one of the eight cells on the Manhattan-distance-2 ring around the player.

rules.name: reflection_alignment
rules.statement: Reflet permits cardinal and diagonal alignment.

rules.name: repulsion_alignment
rules.statement: Rejet targets one of eight cardinal or diagonal rays at aligned distance 1 or 2.

rules.name: attraction_range_metric
rules.statement: Attrait uses cardinal aligned logical steps from range 1 through 6.

rules.name: target_pillar_spell_type
rules.statement: Reflet, Rejet and Attrait may target pillars of every colour.

rules.name: target_line_of_sight
rules.statement: Attrait requires a clear cardinal ray to the target pillar; no pillar or obstacle may lie between player and target.

rules.name: stationary_final_position
rules.statement: An unchanged final position uses the same relative pattern projection and collision resolution as every other final position.

rules.name: recharge_during_adverse_resolution
rules.statement: Matching white recharge still applies during a black-priority adverse resolution.

rules.name: availability_only_repeat_cast
rules.statement: When only boolean spell availability is known, legality of a second cast of the same spell in the same turn is unknown.

rules.name: pillar_path_blocking
rules.statement: Pillars block intermediate displacement cells.

rules.name: direct_center_priority
rules.statement: Priority between direct central-glyph effects and projected black/white collisions is unknown.

rules.name: white_without_black_race_outcome
rules.statement: A turn with one or more projected white pillar hits and no adverse condition advances Crocoburio and recharges matching spells.

rules.name: per_turn_progress_without_track_index
rules.statement: Product contract: current track indices are not required to report which runner advances this turn; they are required only for terminal win/loss prediction.

rules.name: indecision_occupied_target
rules.statement: Indécision may not target a pillar-occupied contact cell.

rules.name: reflection_path_relevance
rules.statement: Reflet cannot cross another pillar or obstacle.
